pricing.disclaimer: Risk Disclaimer: Investments in securities are subject to market risk. Research provided by Sahib Singh Hora, SEBI RA INH000026266. Past performance does not guarantee future returns.

methodology.lead: Every recommendation published on withSahib passes through six sequential filters. A setup that fails any single filter is discarded — regardless of how compelling it looks on the surface.
methodology.process_sub: Each filter runs sequentially. A setup that fails Filter 2 never reaches Filter 3.
methodology.philosophy_title: The one rule that overrides all others.
methodology.quote: Most analysts ask: why should I take this trade? I ask: is there any reason not to. If one filter fails — it is out. Not reconsidered. Not adjusted. Out.

about.name: Sahib Singh Hora
about.bio: I built withSahib to bring institutional-grade equity research to every serious market participant in India. Every recommendation I publish carries my SEBI registration number, my name, and my reasoning. That accountability is the foundation of everything here.

courses.sub: Live, personalised, one-on-one sessions with a SEBI Registered Analyst. Not pre-recorded. Not YouTube. Built around your portfolio.
courses.flagship_desc: This is not a course. This is personalised mentorship with direct access to me.
courses.elite_note: Already on the Elite plan? Courses are included.

footer.tagline: Systematic equity research by a SEBI Registered Analyst. Every recommendation carries a name, a number, and a rationale.
